topic: My glasses grow a little stronger every morning, blurring whatever is near.
title: My Glasses Get Stronger Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my glasses are a little stronger, blurring whatever is close.
scenes.image_prompt: A pair of glasses resting on an open book on a nightstand, lenses catching dim light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have worn the same pair for nine years.
scenes.image_prompt: A worn glasses case on a cluttered desk, scratched surface, low warm lamp light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I clean them on my shirt and set them down.
scenes.image_prompt: Glasses folded beside a folded cloth on a wooden desk, soft side light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One day the room nearby went soft and smeared.
scenes.image_prompt: A blurred bedroom interior as if seen through wrong lenses, sharp distant window, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But far away, everything was sharp.
scenes.image_prompt: A distant doorway in crisp focus down a blurred dim hallway, low light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The optometrist said the lenses kept changing on their own.
scenes.image_prompt: An optometrist phoropter machine in a dim exam room, dials and lenses, cold clinical light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each dawn the near world dissolved further.
scenes.image_prompt: A breakfast table dissolving into smear in the foreground, sharp far wall, grey morning light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I could no longer see my own hands.
scenes.image_prompt: Blurred hands held up before a face, the room beyond crisp and dim, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But far down the hall, something stood very clearly.
scenes.image_prompt: A tall dark silhouette standing sharp at the end of a blurred dim corridor, fog, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It only appeared when I wore them.
scenes.image_prompt: Glasses on a table reflecting a distant standing shape, surroundings soft and dim, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I took them off. The figure stayed, just blurred now.
scenes.image_prompt: A hazy upright form in a dim hallway without lenses, soft edges, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning it was close, and finally in perfect focus.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark coat and shoulders very near and sharp in dim light, face out of frame, heavy shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
